product_brief: A modern, trustworthy Network Operating System built on Linux for service provider networks.
pqc_capability_description: The provided text discusses "Quantum Security & Networking" in a general educational context (defining qubits, superposition) but does not state that Cisco IOS XR currently implements, supports, or has plans for Post-Quantum Cryptography algorithms. No specific PQC algorithms or migration status are mentioned for the product.
crypto_primitives: Not stated (Text mentions "keys and certificates" generally but does not list specific algorithms like ECDSA, RSA, or Ed25519).
key_management_model: Hardware root of trust using a Cisco Trust Anchor Module (TAm) which houses keys and certificates rooted to Cisco; validates bootloader/kernel signatures and enforces IMA appraisal checks.
architecture_type: Linux-based kernel architecture (WindRiver Linux 9, kernel 4.8.28); control plane runs natively on the host; supports containers (LXC, Docker).
latest_version: Release 7 (mentioned as "With Release 7 of IOS XR"); also references Release 6.x.
release_date: Not stated (Document copyright is 2026, but no specific release date for the software version is provided).
primary_platforms: Cisco 8000 series, NCS 540/560, NCS 5000/5500/5700, ASR 9000, XRd, XRv9000, qualified third-party hardware.
